title: December 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 13''' is the 347th day (348th in leap years) of the year. There are 18 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1977]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 9|''Star Wars'' (1977) 9]] published. The cover date is March.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 45|''Star Wars Weekly'' 45]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 81|''Star Wars'' (1977) 81]] published.
*[[1986]] – "[[Party Ewok]]" and "[[Malani the Warrior]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[1994]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]] published.
*[[1994]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 5|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 5]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Mandatory Retirement (TPB)]]'' published.
*2000 – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 1|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 1]] published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]'' received "best video game based on a TV show or movie" at the Spike TV Video Game Awards.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''{{'s}} first day of early access.
*2011 – [[Star Wars Insider 130|''Star Wars Insider'' 130]] published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.41]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars Battlefront II]] Resurrection Campaign DLC released.
*2017 – [[Star Wars (2015) 40|''Star Wars'' (2015) 40]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Chapter 6: The Prisoner]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2019 – ''[[Leia, Princess of Alderaan, Vol. 1]]'' published in Japan.
*[[2020]] – ''[[The Star Wars Archives: Episodes I–III, 1999–2005]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: War of the Bounty Hunters Omnibus]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan — A Jedi's Purpose]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Rebellion Vol. 5]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Bounty Hunters 41|''Bounty Hunters'' 41]] published.
*2023 – [[Hyperspace Stories 12|''Hyperspace Stories'' 12]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic – Shadows of Starlight 3|''The High Republic – Shadows of Starlight'' 3]] published.
